name: GTY Technology Holdings, Inc.
description: GTY Technology Holdings, Inc. is a leading provider of SaaS-based public sector software. The company offers a comprehensive suite of cloud-based solutions designed to help state and local governments, education institutions, and healthcare organizations streamline their operations, manage budgets, process payments, and engage with citizens. Its platform includes specialized tools for budgeting, procurement, grants management, permitting, and utility billing, enabling public sector entities to operate more efficiently and transparently.
